title: KINGLAKE 50m Garden Twine String Green, 2mm Jute Twine Craft String Twine for Crafts, Gift wrapping,Gardening,Packing,Christmas Decoration
features: 【Green Twine】 Thickness: 2mm; Length: 50m (164 feet), jute twine is made of several twisted strands, sturdy and durable; packed on a coil and won’t get tangled, easy to use and store.
【Premium Jute Twine】Green string is made up with natural jute, won’t hurt environment, no impurities, soft tones and very decorative, add a rustic and elegant touch to your gifts and crafts.

【Practical Garden Twine】Green jute twine is ideal for many gardening use, such as tying up plants/shrubs, supporting climbing plants or other vegetables and fruits, give them strong support and better growth, green string blends well in garden.

【Craft & Gift Twine】Green jute string is perfect for DIY art crafting, gift box wrapping, hanging gift tags/cards, decorating bottle/jar/gift bags making scrapbooking, tying bouquets, binding, look very nice and fantastic

【Multi-Purpose Twine】Crafts String can also be used in photo display, hanging Christmas tree ornaments, transform your home furnishings, find more creative uses for the wrappings string! Great decorative twine for Christmas, wedding, birthday, baby shower,Teacher's Day and more.
description: Product Description Green Craft & Gift Twine 2mm green twine is ideal for gift wrapping, hanging gift tags/cards, decorating bottle/jar/gift bags, hanging pictures, making scrapbooking, tying bouquets, etc. Green Christmas Twine Green jute twine is also used as christmas string for hanging xmas decorations and wrapping presents,add special senses to special days or holidays like Christmas, weddings, birthdays, anniversaries and more. Garden Twine Green jute string is perfect for gardening, natural and fresh, tying up vine plants and vegetables with no chemical damage, no harm to environment, and blend in with plants.
